title: descurainia incana var. brevipes
intro: Descurainia incana var. brevipes, also known as Hoary Tansy Mustard, is a perennial plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant properties. Hoary Tansy Mustard can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in some herbal remedies to promote skin health and reduce inflammation.
